name: Enchilada Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the refried beans evenly on a 15-inch oval meat platter.
2. Spread the guacamole dip over the refried beans.
3. Mix the sour cream, mayonnaise, and taco seasoning together, then spread it over the guacamole.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes, pressing them down lightly.
5. Sprinkle the finely chopped scallions on top of the tomatoes.
6. Scatter the chopped olives evenly across the mixture.
7. In the center of the top layer, add a small amount of the sour cream mix and one cilantro leaf for garnish.
8. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 3-4 hours until thoroughly chilled.
9. Serve with tortilla chips. Do not let it sit out for more than 2 hours.
